titleStmt.title: SII 30.65: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan

No. 65. (A.R. No. 142 of 1915.) Paruttippaḷḷi, Tiruchengodu Taluk, Salem District Bhāṇīśvara temple-on the west wall of the maṇḍapa Infront of the central shrine. Nandana, Māśi, 19: Modern characters.

summary.p: Registers the dēvadāṉa gift of a tank with the ratio of 2 shares to Vāṉīśvarā and one to Ādinārāyaṇapperumāḷ by Avināśikkavuṇḍaṉ for the merit of Koṉappayaṉ, Gōpālayaṉ, officials under Tirumalai Nāyaka. Vīrarāgava mudaliār, Chokkanāta mudaliār, Nāyanāta mudaliār also seem to be the officials of that region. Nātiyappa, an accountant of the sabha of nāḍu is mentioned as signatory.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
nantaṉa māci mācam 10 1 nāḷ tirumalaiṉāyakkarayyaṉ kāriyattukku kaṟttarāṉa koṉappayaṉ kopā
layaṉ pārpāṉ viyaṉ kaṣttūriyayyaṉavarkaḷukku taṟmamāka virarākava mutaliyār co
kkanāta mutaliyār naāyaṉātamutaliyāravarkaḷ puṇṇiyattil parittippaḷḷiyi
l Aviṉācik kavuṇṭaṉ kuḷam vāṉicuraṟkku Iraṇṭu paṅkum Ā
ti nārāyaṇap perumāḷukku Oru paṅkum cantirātittar Uḷḷavattaṉai
yum parittippaḷḷi nāṭṭukkavuṇṭarkaḷ Iteyvatāṉa
m naṭattivikkak kaṭavatākavum Inta taṟmattukku yātāmo
ruttar Akutam paṇṇiṉapeṟku keṅkaikkaraiyil kā
rām pacuvai koṇṇa pāvattil pokak kaṭavatā
kavum nāṭṭukkaṇakku nātiyappaṉ Eḷuttu §
Digital edition of SII 30.65 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
